name: Set up FedEx Carrier Labels

Follow the steps below to set these up."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/601-custom-shipping-overview-and-setup#shipping-zones", "children": [{"text": "Add zones for FedEx"}]}, {"text": " or use an existing carrier's zones and skip this step."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1223-add-or-edit-shipping-rates#2", "children": [{"text": "Import shipping rates"}]}, {"text": " for FedEx."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/601-custom-shipping-overview-and-setup#shipping-methods", "children": [{"text": "Add a shipping option"}]}, {"text": " for FedEx."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up FedEx Carrier Labels"}], "data-id": "set-up-fedex-carrier-labels"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up your FedEx carrier labels:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Carriers & Labels", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search for and click on "}, {"text": "FedEx", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your FedEx account details in the "}, {"text": "Connect FedEx Account", "bold": true}, {"text": " section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your warehouse address details in the "}, {"text": "Pickup Address", "bold": true}, {"text": " section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select additional settings in the "}, {"text": "Shipment Configuration", "bold": true}, {"text": " section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Label Configuration", "bold": true}, {"text": " section map fields from your order to the shipping label."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Shipping service", "bold": true}, {"text": " section displays all of the rate tables you've set up in Neto. Toggle the rates for FedEx so that they are active. In the "}, {"text": "Service code", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down menu select the FedEx service that the rates relate to."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have multiple FedEx rates and services, click the "}, {"text": "Add shipping service", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and repeat the previous step."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}]
